name: Synthesis Agent Unit Evaluation
description: Golden dataset for the synthesis agent. Tests majority voting logic given pre-written specialist reports.

parts.text: Style report: AUTHENTICATE. Provenance report: AUTHENTICATE. Valuation report: AUTHENTICATE. Apply quorum voting and issue final verdict.
All three specialists voted AUTHENTICATE. Quorum is unanimous. Final verdict: AUTHENTICATE with high confidence.
Style report: AUTHENTICATE. Provenance report: VERIFY_FURTHER. Valuation report: VERIFY_FURTHER. Apply quorum voting and issue final verdict.

Two specialists voted VERIFY_FURTHER, one voted AUTHENTICATE. Majority vote is VERIFY_FURTHER. Final verdict: VERIFY_FURTHER. Further provenance and market research is recommended before authentication.
Style report: AUTHENTICATE. Provenance report: REJECT. Valuation report: AUTHENTICATE. Apply quorum voting and issue final verdict.

No majority. Style and Valuation voted AUTHENTICATE but Provenance voted REJECT. Without quorum majority, the final verdict is VERIFY_FURTHER. Provenance concerns must be resolved before authentication can proceed.
